name: Bicentennial Park Pickleball Courts
description: Most players use a SWISH app to set up games because the City uses that app for setting up leagues and tournaments.
open_play_schedule: Around 10/11 a.m. depending upon wind & precipitation. Earlier as temps heat up

name: Iron County Fair Building
description: Iron County Fair Building is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Parowan, UT. The court surface is concrete. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Parowan, Utah Indoor/Outdoor Pickleball
description: Parowan, Utah Indoor/Outdoor Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Parowan, UT. There are 7 concrete courts. 3 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
open_play_schedule: Indoor play is cancelled from August to October.

name: Southern Utah Sports Academy
description: Southern Utah Sports Academy is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cedar City, UT. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: SUU Pickleball Courts
description: SUU Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cedar City, UT. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.
